prompt: I just inherited this financial model from someone who left the company. It's a total black box — I can't tell what any of the formulas are doing. Can you audit it and tell me what's wrong with it and how to fix it?
assertions: Discovers the hardcoded COGS percentages (0.59 in D7, 0.58 in E7) and explains the business impact
Quantifies or flags the dollar impact of the COGS error (~$110K in Y2, ~$242K in Y3)
Identifies that the model has ZERO named ranges and ALL formulas use cell coordinates
Flags the WACC formula for LaTeX verification
Produces a compliance score or remediation priority list
Provides a retrofitting plan with proposed Named Range names following IDFA conventions
